reach_why: Reframes continual learning, forgetting, memory tradeoffs, and category boundaries across many learning paradigms.
novelty_why: Treats task/domain/class distinctions as observer-relative symptoms of movement between foundational knowledge attractors.
falsifiable_why: Suggestive but metaphor-heavy; only partially testable via models where selective forgetting improves adaptive stability.
explanation: Learning may require principled forgetting to stay adaptive when knowledge categories are unstable and memory burdens cognition.
